name: 宠物护理档案整理

observable_attributes.reading_strategy: Whether voice memos are all listened to; how photo evidence is used alongside text records
observable_attributes.output_detail: Documentation depth: care timeline vs. comprehensive health profile vs. brief summary
observable_attributes.cross_modal_behavior: How photos, voice memos, vet records, and purchase history are woven into a narrative

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含关于一只宠物猫(Shadow)的各种记录——照片（包括领养第一天、日常生活）、语音备忘录（关于护理挑战）、兽医报告、领养证书、宠物相关邮件（购买猫粮、猫抓柱、预约兽医等）。请综合所有材料，创建一份宠物护理档案，记录Shadow的成长历程、健康状况和护理要点。
prompt_en: This folder contains various records about a pet cat (Shadow) — photos (including adoption day, daily life), voice memos (about care challenges), vet reports, adoption certificate, pet-related emails (food orders, scratching post, vet appointments). Please synthesize all materials to create a pet care profile documenting Shadow's growth journey, health status, and care highlights.
behavioral_freedom: Whether all voice memos are listened to or only care-relevant ones
How photos are incorporated: described in detail vs. briefly referenced
Profile structure: chronological timeline vs. topic-based (health/behavior/supplies)
Whether purchase history from emails is tracked and summarized
Output format: single narrative document vs. structured profile with sections
Whether a photo timeline or visual reference is created
Detail level: brief overview vs. comprehensive care log
